description: Human identity whose nullifierHash appears in the on-chain revocation set. The circuit itself will generate a valid witness (it does not check revocation), but the verifier MUST reject the proof when nullifierHash is in the revocation set. This vector tests the off-chain/on-chain revocation check, not the circuit constraint.
failure_reason: nullifierHash is in the revocation set — verifier must reject even though circuit witness is valid. Revocation is enforced at the application/contract layer, not inside the ZK circuit.

meta.notes: The nullifierHash in revocation_set must equal the nullifierHash produced by the witness. Run extract_vectors.js to freeze both values.
